_comment: Foreign Soul Crystal Flats (外域魂晶平原) — the pale, luminous flats of the Foreign Battleground where soul crystals (the battleground's reward currency) can be mined. Canon: a cold, flat region where the dense chaotic spirit energy has crystallized into soul crystals over eons of cultivator deaths. The ground is pale and luminous from accumulated crystal deposits; lost souls (skeletons/strays) wander the flats as remnants of cultivators who died seeking the crystals. Ice spikes serve as stand-ins for crystal formations erupting from the ground; spirit_vein_quartz_ore stands in for the minable soul crystals. Prime Directive: the soul crystals were objectively deposited by the deaths of countless cultivators — they exist whether or not the player can perceive their value.
